output.explanation: Same departure time 7:10 a.m. appears with multiple arrivals; most frequent pattern is around 9:35-9:40 a.m., so 3:30 p.m. is inconsistent for the same schedule.
Column 3 contains extra timezone text '(-00:00)', unlike the time-only departure format used throughout; this is a syntactic mismatch with the paired schedule fields.
Same departure time 7:10 a.m. appears with arrivals 9:30 a.m., 9:00 a.m., and 10:09 a.m.; this row conflicts with the repeated pattern and is the outlier.
Same departure time 7:35 a.m. elsewhere maps to 9:43 a.m.; arrival 9:21 aDec 2 is inconsistent and also implies an implausible next-day duration for this schedule.
Same departure time 7:15aDec 1 appears with arrivals 10:35aDec 1 and 11:35aDec 1; arrival should be consistent for the same scheduled departure.
Departure 9:15aDec 1 matches another record with arrival 12:08 p.m.; 12:18 p.m. is inconsistent by 10 minutes.
Departure 6:00aDec 1 appears with arrivals 7:30aDec 1 and 6:40aDec 1; one arrival is inconsistent for the same scheduled departure.
Departure 10:40aDec 1 has multiple arrivals, but 12:55 p.m. is supported by another matching record while 2:59 p.m. conflicts.
Arrival 8:27aDec 1 is earlier than departure 1:45 p.m. on the same date, which is temporally impossible for a scheduled trip.
Same departure time 8:35aDec 1 appears with arrivals 11:50aDec 1, 10:40aDec 1, and 11:22 a.m.; 10:40aDec 1 is inconsistent with the repeated later pattern.
Departure 7:10aDec 1 appears with arrivals 9:35aDec 1, 10:45aDec 1, and 3:30 p.m.; 3:30 p.m. is an outlier for the same scheduled departure.
Departure 11/30 11:55 p.m. should arrive next morning; missing date in arrival makes the timestamp format inconsistent with overnight records nearby.
Departure 11/30 11:08 p.m. should arrive next morning; missing date in arrival makes the timestamp format inconsistent with overnight records nearby.
Departure 9:00 p.m. appears with arrivals 12:15aDec 2 and 12:05 a.m.; the 12:05 a.m. value is inconsistent with the repeated departure-arrival dependency.
Departure 8:20 p.m. appears with arrivals 9:18 p.m. and 9:10 p.m.; same scheduled departure should map to one arrival.
Departure 7:10 a.m. has extreme duration to 2:52 p.m. and conflicts with same-time pattern elsewhere where 7:10 departures arrive much earlier; likely mistyped arrival hour.
Arrival includes a full date while departure is time-only; this row mixes timestamp formats for the same itinerary fields.
